chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-679 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 20-02-2025 Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Muhammad Rafique Rajput, Advocate for private respondent. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy P.G for the State. ***** Heard learned counsel for the parties and perused the material available on record. On perusal of impugned order dated 07.11.2024, passed by learned Additional Session Judge-1/Justice of Peace, Sukkur on an application filed by respondent No.4 against applicant and other proposed accused, it appears that the said application has been allowed by directing the concerned SHO to record statement of respondent No.4 under section 154 CrPC and if any cognizable offence is made out, then FIR be registered. The impugned order appears to have been passed after taking into consideration the medical certificate of the injured, which calls for no interference of this Court. Accordingly, instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed. JUDGE Ahmad
